description: Example MIDI-to-NES channel mapping configuration. Use with: generate_project.py --mapping this_file.json

notes.pulse1: MIDI track index for lead melody → Pulse 1
notes.pulse2: MIDI track index for harmony → Pulse 2
notes.triangle: MIDI track index for bass → Triangle
notes.noise: MIDI track index for drums → Noise (GM channel 10 = index 9)

auto_mapping_rules.description: When no mapping config is provided, auto-mapping works as follows:
auto_mapping_rules.drum_detection: Tracks on MIDI channel 10 (0-indexed: 9) are assigned to noise
auto_mapping_rules.bass_detection: Lowest average pitch melodic track → triangle
auto_mapping_rules.overflow: Additional tracks are dropped with a warning
